mnemonics: Noose Always Stops Heroes Elsewhere Quickly
Never Assume Someone Has Envy, Others Will Quit
keyPoints: A Nash equilibrium occurs when no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy, assuming all other players keep their strategies unchanged.
In a Nash equilibrium, no player has an incentive to deviate from their strategy, as any change would lead to a worse outcome.
Nash equilibrium is a concept in game theory that helps in analyzing the outcomes of games where the players' actions are interdependent.
